case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. ORONDE E JOHNSON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, ORONDE E ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-04-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
